name: Ryuk Ransomware Affected Host
description: Ryuk Ransomware infects a host. The alert uses the RYUK_RANSOMWARE_HASH list to compare hash, pre-digest value, or digest in the logs. Ryuk is a notorious ransomware family known for its targeted attacks against large organizations. The presence of these hashes indicates a high probability of an active infection or an attempted attack.

prompts.prompt: A host `{hostname}` was identified as being affected by Ryuk ransomware at `{timestamp}`. The detection was based on the file `{file_name}` with the hash `{file_hash}`. Immediately investigate the extent of the infection on the host and identify any encrypted files. Determine if the ransomware has spread to other hosts or network shares. Provide a detailed report of the incident and recommend an incident response plan, including host isolation and data recovery strategies.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The hostname of the affected host.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The time the ransomware activity was detected.

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: The name of the malicious file.

parameters.name: file_hash
parameters.description: The hash of the malicious file that matched the Ryuk list.
